name: Bread Pudding with Vanilla Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, mix together eggs, sugar, brown sugar, nutmeg, and butter until well combined.
3. Add whipped cream, cubed French bread, and raisins to the mixture. Stir gently until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
4. Pour the batter into a greased 9x13 inch baking dish.
5. Bake for 45-50 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. Remove from oven and let cool slightly before serving.
